ogTitle: Rylstone vs Sackville North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rylstone and Sackville North.
heading: Rylstone vs Sackville North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rylstone, New South Wales and Sackville North, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rylstone has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Sackville North (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rylstone or Sackville North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rylstone has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Sackville North scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rylstone scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Sackville North scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rylstone or Sackville North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rylstone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
